meta_title: Removals in Redhill - Removals and Storage in Surrey

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Premier Removals in Redhill and Surrey

For removals, storage and packing in Redhill Mark Ratcliffe Moving can help. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, you can put your trust in us to look after your move.

How can we help you today?

Need Help with Home or Office Removals in Redhill?

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving

Choosing the right removals company to move your possessions or furniture is extremely important. You need to know you have secured good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the morning will know your requirements thoroughly and have the correct training and equipment to ensure a successful and straightforward move. 

Having worked in the UK domestic removals and storage market for over 30 years, Mark Ratcliffe Moving can satisfy all of these needs. We work with domestic and commercial customers throughout Redhill, Surrey and nationally. Quality is at the heart of everything we do and we are proud of our well respected reputation within the industry. Unlike other moving firms, we offer a range of moving services, taking care of every aspect of your move from beginning to end. From office removals, moving single items, or even moving an entire 4 bed household to the other side of England - we are well equipped with the latest equipment, knowledgeable staff and necessary skill to handle your move with ease.

We are one of just a handful of moving companies with a dedicated staff training centre, all of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, customer services, wrapping and moving household furniture (for home and overseas moving) and vehicle loading. Competitive prices, high standards and a genuine commitment from all involved is guaranteed when choosing Mark Ratcliffe Moving.

Comprehensive Removals Company in Redhill

Following your initial enquiry, Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home (at a time convenient for you) to carry out a site survey. During this time you can discuss all aspects of your forthcoming move including any packing or storage requirements, or insurance cover for your valuable possessions. A fixed quotation can be provided for removals, storage or packing and we also offer a house clearance service that we can provide further details on. On your moving day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect your carpets and we will cover exposed doors and banisters etc. If required, they will also pack and move your belongings with the utmost care and transport them safely to your new home.

Secure Self Storage Facilities  

Our secure self storage rooms are available to rent for customers who prefer to deposit / remove their own goods to / from store. Our self storage facilities are available in a variety of sizes, our most popular size is the 77 sqft option (which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres). This sized room is rented out for £30 plus vat (per week) and with our storage rooms being much higher than local competitors and prices being over 50% less, you receive great value for money. Our self storage rooms are secure, damp free and clean and there is also great access for loading / unloading and you are the only key holder. 

Packing and Unpacking

As part of our complete moving service, we offer a full packing service which includes a full packing option and fragile item packing. If you decide to carry out your own packing, we can provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc. All products are minimal in cost. 

Contact our Team Today

Whether you looking for assistance with removals in Redhill or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready to help. We can satisfy all of your wider moving needs including secure storage, export packing and house clearance. Our friendly team would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation and our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or we can arrange an appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store Customers is also available.

Professional Redhill Removals from a company you can rely on!
